headlines.headline: Wyrnik Sciences names new head of cloud infrastructure division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head can signal strategic changes or a renewed focus, but the immediate financial impact is indirect and uncertain.

headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma completes strategic acquisition to strengthen digital payments

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
